columns.name: _BilledSize
columns.description: The record size in bytes

columns.name: BytesSent
columns.description: Amount of bytes sent from the source to the destination.

columns.name: DestGatewayInterconnectName
columns.description: If the type of the gateway is INTERCONNECT_ATTACHMENT, this field is populated with the name of the Cloud Interconnect connection on which the VLAN attachment is configured.

columns.name: DestGatewayInterconnectProjectNumber
columns.description: If the type of the gateway is INTERCONNECT_ATTACHMENT, this field is populated with the Google Cloud project number of the Cloud Interconnect connection on which the VLAN attachment is configured.

columns.name: DestGatewayLocation
columns.description: Region of the destination gateway

columns.name: DestGatewayName
columns.description: Name of the destination gateway

columns.name: DestGatewayProjectId
columns.description: Google Cloud project ID of the destination gateway

columns.name: DestGatewayType
columns.description: Type of the destination gateway. Can be INTERCONNECT_ATTACHMENT or VPN_TUNNEL.

columns.name: DestGatewayVpc
columns.description: VPC network details of the gateway

columns.name: DestGkeClusterLocation
columns.description: Location of the destination cluster. This can be a zone or a region depending if the cluster is zonal or regional.

columns.name: DestGkeClusterName
columns.description: Destination GKE cluster name.

columns.name: DestGkePodName
columns.description: Name of the destination Pod

columns.name: DestGkePodNamespace
columns.description: Namespace of the destination Pod

columns.name: DestGkePodWorkloadName
columns.description: Name of the top-level destination workload controller

columns.name: DestGkePodWorkloadType
columns.description: Type of the top-level destination workload controller.

columns.name: DestGkeService
columns.description: Destination GKE Service name.

columns.name: DestGoogleServiceType
columns.description: This field is set to GOOGLE_API if the destination is a Google API service.

columns.name: DestInstanceGroupName
columns.description: Name of the instance group

columns.name: DestInstanceGroupRegion
columns.description: If the instance group is regional, this field is populated with the region of the instance group.

columns.name: DestInstanceGroupZone
columns.description: If the instance group is zonal, this field is populated with the zone of the instance group.

columns.name: DestInstanceProjectId
columns.description: ID of the Google Cloud project that contains the VM resource

columns.name: DestInstanceRegion
columns.description: Region of the VM

columns.name: DestInstanceVmName
columns.description: Instance name of the VM

columns.name: DestInstanceZone
columns.description: Zone of the VM

columns.name: DestIp
columns.description: Destination IP address

columns.name: DestLocationAsn
columns.description: The ASN of the external destination network to which this endpoint belongs.

columns.name: DestLocationCity
columns.description: City for external destination endpoints.

columns.name: DestLocationContinent
columns.description: Continent for external destination endpoints.

columns.name: DestLocationCountry
columns.description: Country for external destination endpoints.

columns.name: DestLocationRegion
columns.description: Region for external destination endpoints.

columns.name: DestPort
columns.description: Destination port

columns.name: DestVpcName
columns.description: Name of the network

columns.name: DestVpcProjectId
columns.description: ID of the Google Cloud project containing the VPC

columns.name: DestVpcSubnetworkName
columns.description: Name of the subnet

columns.name: DestVpcSubnetworkRegion
columns.description: Region of the subnet

columns.name: EndTime
columns.description: Timestamp of the last observed packet during the aggregated time interval.

columns.name: GCPResourceType
columns.description: Type of the resource (e.g., compute instance, DNS record).

columns.name: InsertId
columns.description: A unique identifier assigned to each log entry.

columns.name: InternetRoutingDetailsEgressAsn
columns.description: List of relevant AS paths. If there are multiple AS paths available to the flow, the field might contain more than one AS path.

columns.name: _IsBillable
columns.description: Specifies whether ingesting the data is billable. When _IsBillable isfalseingestion isn't billed to your Azure account

columns.name: LbBackendGroupLocation
columns.description: Location of the backend group

columns.name: LbBackendGroupName
columns.description: Name of the backend group

columns.name: LbBackendGroupType
columns.description: Type of the backend group

columns.name: LbBackendServiceName
columns.description: Name of the backend service.

columns.name: LbForwardingRuleName
columns.description: Name of the forwarding rule

columns.name: LbForwardingRuleProjectId
columns.description: Google Cloud project ID of the forwarding rule

columns.name: LbReporter
columns.description: Cloud Load Balancing reporter. Can be either CLIENT or BACKEND

columns.name: LbScheme
columns.description: Load balancer scheme

columns.name: LbType
columns.description: Load balancer type.

columns.name: LbUrlMapName
columns.description: Name of the URL map. Populated if the type of the load balancer is APPLICATION_LOAD_BALANCER.

columns.name: LbVpc
columns.description: VPC network details of the load balancer

columns.name: Location
columns.description: Location of the resource.

columns.name: LogName
columns.description: The name of the log where this entry is stored.

columns.name: NetworkServiceDscp
columns.description: If the Differentiated Services field is present in packet headers, this field is populated with the DSCP value.

columns.name: PacketsSent
columns.description: Number of packets sent from the source to the destination.

columns.name: ProjectId
columns.description: ProjectId of the resource.

columns.name: Protocol
columns.description: The IANA protocol number

columns.name: PscAttachmentProjectId
columns.description: Google Cloud project ID of the service attachment

columns.name: PscAttachmentRegion
columns.description: Region of the service attachment

columns.name: PscAttachmentVpc
columns.description: VPC network details of the service attachment

columns.name: PscEndpointConnectionId
columns.description: Private Service Connect connection ID

columns.name: PscEndpointProjectId
columns.description: Google Cloud project ID of the Private Service Connect endpoint

columns.name: PscEndpointRegion
columns.description: Region of the endpoint. Not populated if the target service type is GLOBAL_GOOGLE_APIS.

columns.name: PscEndpointTargetServiceType
columns.description: Target service type. Can be either GLOBAL_GOOGLE_APIS or PUBLISHED_SERVICE.

columns.name: PscEndpointVpc
columns.description: VPC network details of the Private Service Connect endpoint

columns.name: ReceiveTimestamp
columns.description: Timestamp of the event when it was received by the logging service.

columns.name: Reporter
columns.description: The side which reported the flow.

columns.name: Rttmsec
columns.description: The measured latency is the time elapsed between sending a SEQ and receiving a corresponding ACK.

columns.name: SourceSystem
columns.description: The type of agent the event was collected by. For example,OpsManagerfor Windows agent, either direct connect or Operations Manager,Linuxfor all Linux agents, orAzurefor Azure Diagnostics

columns.name: SrcGatewayInterconnectName
columns.description: If the type of the gateway is INTERCONNECT_ATTACHMENT, this field is populated with the name of the Cloud Interconnect connection on which the VLAN attachment is configured.

columns.name: SrcGatewayInterconnectProjectNumber
columns.description: If the type of the gateway is INTERCONNECT_ATTACHMENT, this field is populated with the Google Cloud project number of the Cloud Interconnect connection on which the VLAN attachment is configured.

columns.description: Region of the gateway

columns.name: SrcGatewayName
columns.description: Name of the gateway

columns.name: SrcGatewayProjectId
columns.description: Google Cloud project ID of the gateway

columns.name: SrcGatewayType
columns.description: Type of the gateway. Can be INTERCONNECT_ATTACHMENT or VPN_TUNNEL.

columns.name: SrcGatewayVpc
columns.description: VPC network details of the gateway

columns.name: SrcGkeClusterLocation
columns.description: Location of the source cluster. This can be a zone or a region depending if the cluster is zonal or regional.

columns.name: SrcGkeClusterName
columns.description: Source GKE cluster name.

columns.name: SrcGkePodName

columns.name: SrcGkePodWorkloadName
columns.description: Name of the top-level source workload controller

columns.name: SrcGkePodWorkloadType
columns.description: Type of the top-level source workload controller.

columns.name: SrcGkeService
columns.description: Source GKE Service name.

columns.name: SrcGoogleServiceType
columns.description: This field is set to GOOGLE_API if the source is a Google API service.

columns.name: SrcInstanceGroupName
columns.description: Name of the source instance group

columns.description: If the source instance group is regional, this field is populated with the region of the source instance group.

columns.name: SrcInstanceGroupZone
columns.description: If the source instance group is zonal, this field is populated with the zone of the source instance group.

columns.description: ID of the Google Cloud project that contains the source VM resource

columns.name: SrcInstanceRegion
columns.description: Region of the source VM

columns.description: Instance name of the source VM

columns.name: SrcInstanceZone
columns.description: Zone of the source VM

columns.description: Source IP address

columns.description: The ASN of the external source network to which this endpoint belongs.

columns.name: SrcLocationCity
columns.description: City for external source endpoints.

columns.description: Continent for external source endpoints.

columns.name: SrcLocationCountry

columns.description: Region for external source endpoints.

columns.name: SrcPort
columns.description: Source port

columns.description: Name of the source subnet,

columns.description: Name of the source region

columns.name: StartTime
